base_prompt: Pixel-art sprite of particles — a effect_layer (atmospheric_vfx) from 1992 super mario kart. Dust/smoke/sparks from drifting + hit-stun + boost-flames. Centered on magenta (#FF00FF) background, 8-bit or 16-bit pixel-art aesthetic, no anti-aliasing, chunky pixels. Single canonical pose (frame 0 of animation).
